'''yasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irreflexively|irreflexively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irreflexively|irreflexively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yasate|yasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yasatesher|yasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasatesherĂ«m|yasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yasatero|yasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yasateshĂ«|yasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasateshĂ«m|yasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyasatero|gokiyasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyasateshĂ«|gokiyasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasateshĂ«m|gokiyasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyasankerom|goyasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyasankeshĂ«|goyasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasankeshĂ«m|goyasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyasankeya|goyasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yasaterom|yasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasatemu|yasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yasateya|yasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyasaterom|gokiyasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasatemu|gokiyasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyasateya|gokiyasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yasasate|yasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yasasatesher|yasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasasatesherĂ«m|yasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yasasatero|yasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yasasateshĂ«|yasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasasateshĂ«m|yasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyasasatero|gokiyasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyasasateshĂ«|gokiyasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasasateshĂ«m|gokiyasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyasasankerom|goyasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyasasankeshĂ«|goyasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyasasankeshĂ«m|goyasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyasasankeya|goyasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yasasaterom|yasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yasasatemu|yasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yasasateya|yasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyasasaterom|gokiyasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyasasatemu|gokiyasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyasasateya|gokiyasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠsĂŠte|yĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠsĂŠtesher|yĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠsĂŠtero|yĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠsĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠsĂŠteya|yĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠsĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠsĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafsafte|yafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafsaftesher|yafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafsaftesherĂ«m|yafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafsaftero|yafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafsafteshĂ«|yafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafsafteshĂ«m|yafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafsaftero|gokiyafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafsafteshĂ«|gokiyafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafsafteshĂ«m|gokiyafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafsafnkerom|goyafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafsafnkeshĂ«|goyafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafsafnkeshĂ«m|goyafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafsafnkeya|goyafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafsafterom|yafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafsaftemu|yafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafsafteya|yafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafsafterom|gokiyafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafsaftemu|gokiyafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafsafteya|gokiyafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
